hero.name: Suraj
hero.tagline: Computer Science Student & Aspiring Machine Learning Engineer
hero.subtitle: I build scalable web apps, experiment with machine learning models, and love turning ideas into real-world projects.

about.bio: I'm a Computer Science Engineering student from Maharashtra, India, focused on building efficient web applications and exploring machine learning. I enjoy writing clean, maintainable code and turning complex problems into simple, usable solutions.
about.bio2: Outside of coding, I spend time experimenting with new technologies, contributing to personal projects, and learning how real-world systems are built. I'm actively looking for internship and project opportunities where I can grow, contribute, and build meaningful software.

projects.title: AI Language Detection & Translation System
projects.description: A machine learning-powered web application that detects language and translates text using deep learning models, with a full-stack deployment pipeline.

projects.title: Scalable REST API Platform
projects.description: A production-ready REST API built using FastAPI with JWT authentication, Dockerized deployment, and PostgreSQL backend.

projects.title: Developer Automation CLI
projects.description: An open-source Python CLI tool to automate repetitive developer workflows, improving productivity and consistency.
